welcome.title: Welcome to Your MSP Command Center
welcome.description: Track onboarding progress, configure critical services, and keep every client experience consistent.
welcome.descriptionCommunity: Jump into tickets, scheduling, projects, and reporting from your dashboard.

tickets.title: Ticket Management
tickets.description: Streamline support with routing, SLA tracking, and guided workflows.

monitoring.title: System Monitoring
monitoring.description: Watch critical signals across clients and trigger automation when needed.

security.title: Security Management
security.description: Manage policies, approvals, and audit responses in one place.

projects.title: Project Management
projects.description: Organize delivery plans, tasks, and milestones for every engagement.

reports.title: Reporting & Analytics
reports.description: Build rollups on utilization, SLA attainment, and profitability.

schedule.title: Schedule Management
schedule.description: Coordinate onsite visits and remote sessions with bi-directional sync.

knowledgeBase.title: Need a deeper dive?
knowledgeBase.description: Explore deployment runbooks and best practices in the knowledge base.

onboarding.completeDescription: You're ready to use the full MSP dashboard experience.
onboarding.incompleteDescription: Work through each step to unlock the full MSP dashboard experience.

substeps.dataImport: Complete your first import OR create 5 contacts

portal.inviteFirstContact: Invite your first contact to the portal

hidden.title: Hidden setup cards ({{count}})
hidden.subtitle: Restore any card if you need it later.

checklist.title: Onboarding checklist
checklist.completeDescription: Invite clients to experience your branded portal.

identity.title: Secure Identity & SSO
identity.description: Connect Google Workspace or Microsoft 365 so admins sign in with managed identities.

portal.title: Set Up Customer Portal
portal.description: Configure your portal so customers can sign in on your domain with your branding.

dataImport.title: Import Core Data
dataImport.description: Add contacts so you can start working for clients and keep workflows moving.

calendar.title: Calendar Sync
calendar.description: Connect Google or Outlook calendars to keep dispatch and client appointments aligned.

email.title: Configure Email
email.description: Set up inbound ticket email and verify an outbound sending domain for reliable delivery.

identity.linkedAccountsUnavailable: Unable to verify linked team members right now.
identity.noLinkedUsers: No users are linked to an identity provider yet. Ask an MSP admin to connect Google or Microsoft.
identity.addProviderCredentials: Add Google Workspace or Microsoft 365 credentials to enable SSO for your team.
identity.configurationUnavailable: SSO provider configuration is unavailable in this environment.
identity.loadFailed: Unable to load SSO configuration status.
